results.title: Home - Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority
results.snippet: Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority oversees national, uniform integrity and safety rules for Thoroughbred racing in the United States.

results.query: horse racing welfare safety integrity anti doping rules
results.title: Regulations - Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority
results.snippet: Read the rules and regulations that comprise HISA's Racetrack Safety Program as well as HISA's proposed Anti-Doping and Medication Control (ADMC) rules .
results.content: # Regulations - Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority Press Option+1 for screen-reader mode, Option+0 to cancel[Accessibility Screen-Reader Guide, Feedback, and Issue Reporting | New window](https://accessibe.com/blog/knowledgebase/screen-reader-guide) [* 1-877-513-2919](tel:1-877-513-2919) [* Login / Register](https://portal.hisausapps.org/login) [* Rulings](https://portal.hisausapps.org/public-rulings) [* HIWU](https://hiwu.org/) [* Tip Line](https://www.hiwu.org/tip-line) [![Image 1](blob:http://localhost/e49ad3bf2150f11e865a8e6ac52d5ea9)![Image 2](https://hisaus.org/images/HISA-seal-stacked.svg)](https://hisaus.org/) [* About Us About Us](https://hisaus.org/about-us) * Our Mission * The Act * HISA Racetracks * Our Team * HISA 101 * Organizational and Budget Documents [* News News](https://hisaus.org/news) [* Regulations Regulations](https://hisaus.org/regulations) [* Resources Resources](https://hisaus.org/resources) * FAQs About HISA's Rules [* Events Events](https://hisaus.org/event-recaps) * Event Recaps * Jockey Wellness Conference [* Careers Careers](https://hisaus.org/careers) [* Contact Us Contact Us](https://hisaus.org/contact-us) [](https://hisaus.org/regulations) ## Regulations The rules and regulations that comprise HISA’s Racetrack Safety Program were approved by the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) prior to their implementation on July 1, 2022. HISA’s Anti-Doping and Medication Control (ADMC) rules and regulations were approved by the FTC on March, 27 2023, and were implemented on May 22, 2023. HISA’s rule-making process has consistently included robust stakeholder engagement, during which HISA has solicited feedback from relevant industry groups and posted draft proposed rules and regulations for public comment. HISA will continuously update and evolve its rules on an ongoing basis as data, experience on the ground and stakeholder feedback dictate. All rule updates and official rules guidance are subject to FTC approval. ## TABLE OF CONTENTS ##### HISA Rules and Regulations * [General Provisions (Rule Series 1000)](https://hisaus.org/regulations#general-provisions-(rule-series-1000)) * [Racetrack Safety Program (Rule Series 2000)](https://hisaus.org/regulations#racetrack-safety-program-(rule-series-2000)) * [Equine Anti-Doping and Controlled Medication Protocol Rules (Rule Series 3000)](https://hisaus.org/regulations#equine-anti-doping-and-controlled-medication-protocol-rules-(rule-series-3000)) * [Prohibited List (Rule Series 4000)...
